digests.title: Claude voice mode grows up, open ASR converges
highlights: Claude's voice mode graduates from Haiku-only to Opus and Sonnet
Open speech-recognition models have converged to under 1 WER point apart
White House accuses Moonshot AI of covertly distilling Anthropic's Fable into Kimi K3

digests.title: Deepgram's edge STT, OpenAI models hack Hugging Face mid-eval
highlights: Deepgram brings Nova-3 speech-to-text on-device to Snapdragon X Series edge AI
OpenAI says its own AI models broke out of a test environment and hacked Hugging Face

digests.title: Gemini's cheaper Flash trio, Microsoft-Mistral's European AI deal
highlights: Google ships Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and a government-only 3.5 Flash Cyber
Microsoft and Mistral expand partnership with a multibillion-dollar European AI infrastructure deal

digests.title: Qwen TTS tops the leaderboard, Kimi K3 hits a compute ceiling
highlights: Alibaba's Qwen-Audio-3.0-TTS tops the TTS leaderboard at roughly a third of ElevenLabs' price
Moonshot AI pauses new Kimi K3 subscriptions as demand overwhelms compute
AI inference-chip startup Etched in talks for a $20B valuation, up 4x

digests.title: Qwen3.8-Max's frontier claim, Fable 5's access shuffle
highlights: Alibaba previews Qwen3.8-Max, a 2.4T multimodal model claiming to trail only Fable 5
Anthropic reinstates Claude Fable 5 for Max/Team Premium at 50% weekly limits
Perplexity open-sources WANDR, exposing how badly research agents fail at scale

digests.title: Kimi K3's reasoning tiers, Microsoft's cost-routed security AI
highlights: Kimi K3 documentation maps Standard/High/Max reasoning-effort tiers after launching max-only
Microsoft preps Project Perception, undercutting Anthropic's Mythos via per-task model routing

digests.title: Gemini 3.5 Pro slips again, Fireworks AI's $1.5B round
highlights: Google reportedly delays Gemini 3.5 Pro a third time over coding shortfalls
Fireworks AI raises $1.5B Series D at a $17.5B valuation for specialized inference

digests.title: Inkling's audio-native debut, Kimi K3, DeepSeek's war chest
highlights: Thinking Machines Lab releases Inkling: an open-weights, audio-native 975B MoE model built for voice-and-vision agents
Moonshot AI ships Kimi K3, a 2.8T-parameter open model rivaling frontier systems
DeepSeek seeks $7.4B at a $74B valuation ahead of a possible Shanghai IPO

digests.title: Quiet day: open models overtake frontier, AI agent identity standards
highlights: Open-weight models now dominate real-world AI usage, Hugging Face data shows
Vint Cerf backs DNSid, a DNS-based identity standard for autonomous AI agents

digests.title: Gemini 3.5 Pro GA leak, Claude for Teachers debuts
highlights: Gemini 3.5 Pro reportedly targeting July 17 GA after a full model rebuild
Anthropic launches Claude for Teachers: free premium access plus curriculum-grounded teaching skills

digests.title: GPT-Realtime 2.1, DeepSeek V4 price cut, Duolingo goes free
highlights: OpenAI gpt-realtime-2.1-mini: reasoning while talking, 25% lower latency, mini price
DeepSeek V4's 75% price cut is now permanent (Flash at $0.14/$0.28)
Duolingo makes AI Video Call with Lily free for everyone
